title: About - Elsie Blundell MP

text_excerpt: About - Elsie Blundell MP Skip to main content Elsie Blundell MP Parliamentary Website for Heywood and Middleton North About Contact Campaigns End Furniture Poverty Royal Mail Bring Back the Express! World Book Day Fly High More Menu About Portrait of Elsie Blundell MP - ©House of Commons/Roger Harris I was born in Barrow, Cumbria, attending school and growing up there until attending the University of Manchester to study politics and international relations, graduating in 2012. I moved to Rochdale in 2015 and have been active in the community and on the local council. I have come to love it here, building my life and starting a family locally. I am passionate about the area and the importance of local people having as much opportunity to live happily, work, and start a family as anywhere else. That’s why I will stand up for Heywood and Middleton North, including the communities of Castleton, Bamford, Spotland, Falinge, and Norden, in every way I can. On the 30th September 2024, myself and my husband, John, celebrated the birth of our first child. Elsie Blundell MP Contact details Email: elsie.blundell.mp@parliament.uk Further details Elsie Blundell MP 15 Bridge Street Heywood OL10 1JB ©2026 Copyright Elsie Blundell MP. All rights reserved.
